text.title: Risk Register Examples
text.summary: Sample 3-row register snippet at end of a weekly cycle.

example.title: Checkout redesign — week 5 register snapshot
example.code: | ID | Description | Cat | P | I | Score | Strategy | Owner | Trigger | Evidence | Status | Last review | |-------|-----------------------|--------|---|---|-------|----------|---------|----------------------------|-----------------------|-------------------|-------------| | R-001 | Vendor API break | vendor | L | H | 0.06 | transfer | Petro | vendor changelog cite | contract-sow-v2.pdf | active | 2026-05-22 | | R-002 | Key dev leaves | people | M | H | 0.18 | mitigate | Iryna | HRIS resignation notice | hr-attrition-table.md | active | 2026-05-22 | | R-003 | Performance SLA miss | tech | M | M | 0.06 | mitigate | Andriy | p95 > 800ms in canary | grafana-q2.json | closed_passed | 2026-05-22 |
example.commentary: R-003 closed_passed after canary held p95 < 500ms for 2 weeks. R-002 escalated H impact after cost-estimation rebaseline.
